Afro House Indie House Nu Groove / Disco Minimal Music On Tech
EMAIL·+1 781-999-0530

Jude is a States-born DJ, raised by an Italian funk drummer, now based in LA. He has played at some of the top venues around LA, bringing his global touch to every set. Blending rap and pop's known vocals through the most minimal groovy sounds he stamps his taste but reads the room.
